phrases.intent_en: Where is the Sala do governador?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Sala do governador?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOO goo-vih-ruh-nuh-DOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The Sala do governador is one of the interior rooms of Belém Tower, typically accessed via the main entrance.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no interior da torre.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO een-tih-REEOHR DUH TAW-rih.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it's inside the tower.

responses.english: Good morning, it's inside the tower.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO een-tih-REEOHR DUH TAW-rih.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica no interior da torre.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Sala do governador?
phrases.text_local: Siga as placas para a Sala do governador.
phrases.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOO goo-vih-ruh-nuh-DOHR.
phrases.cultural_note: The governor's room offers historical context on the tower's military administration.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala do governador.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOO goo-vih-ruh-nuh-DOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Governor's Hall.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Governor's Hall.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOO goo-vih-ruh-nuh-DOHR.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Sala do governador.

likely_response.local: A bilheteira fica na entrada principal.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh FEE-kuh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket booth is at the main entrance.

responses.english: The ticket booth is at the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh FEE-kuh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL.
responses.french: A bilheteira fica na entrada principal.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I get the audio guide?
phrases.text_local: Onde se retiram os equipamentos de áudio para a tour?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH reh-TEE-ruhng OOSH eh-kee-puh-MAYNG-toosh DIH OW-deeoo PUH-ruh AH TOHWR?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are distributed at a dedicated desk before security checks.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a bilheteira para o bilhete combinado?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh PUH-ruh AW bee-LYEH-tih koom-bee-NAH-doo?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao rececionista ou ao bilheteiro na entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the receptionist or ticket clerk at the entrance.

responses.english: Ask the receptionist or ticket clerk at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh OHW OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo NUH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao rececionista ou ao bilheteiro na entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the ticket validation slot?
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde está a ranhura para validar o ingresso?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih ehs-TAH AH rahn-NYOO-ruh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW eeng-RIH-soo?
phrases.cultural_note: Validation slots are placed near turnstiles to streamline visitor flow.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, dirija-se à bilheteira para validar o ingresso.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW eeng-RIH-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go to the ticket booth to validate the ticket.

responses.english: Good morning, go to the ticket booth to validate the ticket.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-DAHR AW eeng-RIH-soo.
responses.french: Bom dia, dirija-se à bilheteira para validar o ingresso.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the gift shop exit?
phrases.text_local: Por favor, onde fica a saída da loja de lembranças?
phrases.pronunciation: POOR fuh-VOHR, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SUHEE-duh DUH LAW-zhuh DIH laymb-RAHNNG-suhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Gift shop exits in Portuguese monuments often lead directly to the outer courtyard.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia ou ao segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the guide or the security guard.

responses.english: Ask the guide or the security guard.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia ou ao segurança.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I validate my ticket?
phrases.text_local: Onde devo validar o meu bilhete de entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih DEH-voo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih DIH ayngt-RAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket validation slots are standard at heritage sites to prevent reuse.

likely_response.translation_en: You can validate it at the ticket booth.

responses.english: You can validate it at the ticket booth.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I get the audio guide?
phrases.text_local: Onde posso obter o audioguia para a visita?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo awb-TEHR AW ow-deeoo-GEEUH PUH-ruh AH vee-ZEE-tuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically collected near the main checkpoint before ascending the tower.

phrases.text_local: Poderia indicar o caminho para a Sala do Governador?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-dih-REEUH een-dee-KAHR AW kuh-MEE-nyoo PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOO goo-vih-ruh-nuh-DOHR?
phrases.cultural_note: The governor's chamber historically oversaw river traffic and fortress operations.

likely_response.local: A Sala do Governador é um dos espaços do monumento. Siga as placas ou pergunte ao fiscal ou ao guia.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH SAH-luh DOO goo-vih-ruh-nuh-DOHR EH OONNG DOOSH SHPAH-soosh DOO moo-noo-MAYNG-too. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL OHW OW GEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: The Governor's Chamber is one of the spaces in the monument. Follow the signs or ask the floor monitor or guide.

responses.english: The Governor's Chamber is one of the spaces in the monument. Follow the signs or ask the floor monitor or guide.
responses.phonetic: AH SAH-luh DOO goo-vih-ruh-nuh-DOHR EH OONNG DOOSH SHPAH-soosh DOO moo-noo-MAYNG-too. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh OHW peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW feesh-KAHL OHW OW GEEUH.
responses.french: A Sala do Governador é um dos espaços do monumento. Siga as placas ou pergunte ao fiscal ou ao guia.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Terraço do baluarte?
phrases.text_local: Scusi, onde fica o Terraço do baluarte?
phrases.pronunciation: skoo-ZEE, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW teh-RAH-soo DOO buh-LOOAH-ruh-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: The Terraço do baluarte is a popular viewpoint; stairs are narrow, so be prepared for one-way traffic.

likely_response.translation_en: Follow the stairs on the right.

responses.english: Follow the stairs on the right.
